title: geography — developer configuration
vendorConfigNote: The `nnjeim/world` vendor has its own config file we DO NOT edit — we override selected keys at runtime from GeographyServiceProvider::register() so vendor model classes get rebound to our subclasses.

keys.description: Master response-cache switch. False bypasses geography.cache middleware entirely.
Response cache TTL in seconds. 0 disables writes to cache (reads still checked).
Redis key prefix. Matches the value used in tags.
Rate-limiter cap per authenticated user for /geolocate.
Fallback locale for country name resolution when the caller doesn't specify.
Which source to try first. Both are always available as fallback.
Enable the weekly MaxMind refresh job.
Required for geography:refresh-maxmind. Register a free account at maxmind.com.
Local path for the GeoLite2 binary DB.
Fire MaxMindDatabaseStale event when the DB is older than this. Also drives the health probe threshold.

vendor_overrides.description: Keys rebound at GeographyServiceProvider::register(). These override values in vendor's config/world.php.

keys.value: config('geography.accepted_locales', [23 vendor default locales + any localization-approved additions])
